summary: Part of the USCIS Alien Registration Requirement PSA series ('Stay on the right side of the law'), explaining who must register. Captioned voiceover narration plays over generic stock B-roll (a small-town street with pedestrians, hands typing on a laptop) bookended by ARR logo and USCIS.gov/alienregistration cards. It is a dry, narration-driven informational/compliance PSA with no music, genre styling, or youth-appeal spectacle.
notable_text: ARR Alien Registration Requirement; Registering with USCIS ensures; You don't have to register; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
